planning_constraints: No score claim is made by this static profile.
No remote job or exact eval dispatch is performed by this tool.
Any future score claim must use archive.zip -> inflate.sh -> upstream/evaluate.py on CUDA.
PR85 runtime is not imported; schema facts are first-level static parses only.
QMA9 token-prefix facts are bounded pure-Python mask-stream forensics, not decoded-video parity.

failure_modes_guarded: checkpoint or prefix outside decoded mask bounds
qma9_mask_token_prefix_profile.promotable_reason: bounded mask-token prefix profile only; no archive transform or exact CUDA eval

recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.isolation_scope: neutralize or transplant the six micro side-channel streams as a stack, then bisect by segment
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.next_local_step: build neutral decoded tables for each stream and plan a deterministic local ablation ladder.
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.opportunity: small frame-1 geometric/RGB/region adjustment stack with strong byte-to-control leverage
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.rationale: Tiny charged footprint controls every pair through shifts, fractional grids, bias, and region choices; good EV for attribution despite small size.

recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.isolation_scope: mask-only transplant with unchanged joint-frame model and all side-channel payloads
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.next_local_step: extract QMA9 header/body facts and compare decoded mask geometry against candidate bases without running scorer.
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.opportunity: dominant charged semantic-mask representation and likely reusable base for PR85-style adaptive masking
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.rationale: Largest byte mass and first-order semantic representation; high component risk means it needs local decode parity and pose-safety gates before dispatch planning.

recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.isolation_scope: model-only transplant with PR85 mask/pose/post side channels preserved
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.next_local_step: parse tensor-table boundaries with an AST-derived module manifest before any torch import or runtime execution.
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.opportunity: compressed JointFrameGenerator weights isolated from mask and side-channel controls
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.rationale: Large byte block with a custom QH0 quantized schema; model-only swaps can attribute renderer capacity but require strict runtime-custody controls.

recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.isolation_scope: zero or transplant only randmulti while preserving mask/model/pose/post/shift/frac/bias/region bytes
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.next_local_step: build a local replay-only archive variant with randmulti removed or replaced by neutral tables, then compare byte closure and decoded output hashes.
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.opportunity: largest explicit post-render side-channel with sparse per-pair/grid corrections
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.rationale: High decoded control surface and direct frame-1 correction path; attribution can be measured by one isolated ablation before any remote exact eval.

recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.isolation_scope: post-only neutralization while preserving all frame-1 geometric and sparse correction streams
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.next_local_step: emit neutral post choices for all stages and run local replay output-hash comparison only.
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.opportunity: compact 4-stage per-pair RGB gain/bias postprocess codebook choices
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.rationale: Low charged bytes but complete 600-pair stage coverage; cheap to ablate locally and likely cleanly attributable.

recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.isolation_scope: pose-only transplant or neutralization with PR85 mask/model/post side channels preserved
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.next_local_step: decode P1D1 dimensions and stream lengths, then compare pose manifold ranges against candidate archives.
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.opportunity: very small 6D pose delta stream coupled to the frame-1 conditioned head
recommended_isolated_transplant_eval_can.rationale: Excellent byte leverage but PoseNet-sensitive; planning should remain local until exact pose safety and output parity gates exist.

schema_facts.static_parse_limit: tensor table depends on JointFrameGenerator module order in replay runtime
